apps.name: Kodi
apps.description: The ultimate open source media center. Stream anything, play local files, add-ons and more.

apps.name: VLC Media Player
apps.description: Free, open source video and audio player. Plays almost any file format.

apps.name: MX Player
apps.description: Powerful video player with hardware acceleration and subtitle support.

apps.name: Downloader by AFTVnews
apps.description: The original sideloading app for Fire TV. Browse and download any APK directly on your Firestick.

apps.name: button Mapper
apps.description: Remap Firestick remote buttons to do whatever you want.

apps.name: Wolf Launcher
apps.description: Clean, fast custom home screen launcher for Fire TV devices.

apps.name: Smart YouTube TV
apps.description: YouTube for your TV — no ads, background play, 4K support.

apps.name: Stremio
apps.description: One place for all your video content. Movies, series, live TV and more.

apps.name: Plex
apps.description: Stream your personal media collection plus free movies and TV.

apps.name: Jellyfin for Android TV
apps.description: Free and open source media server client. Self-hosted Netflix alternative.

apps.name: X-Plore File Manager
apps.description: Dual-pane file manager. Browse local files, USB drives, network shares and cloud storage.

apps.name: Your Custom App
apps.description: Replace this with your own app — edit app_list.json on GitHub!
